title: astragalus sanctae-crucis
intro: Astragalus sanctae-crucis, also known as the sacred cross bean or crossvine milk vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, native to Western Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have immunomodulatory and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits associated with Astragalus sanctae-crucis include reduced stress and fatigue, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Astragalus sanctae-crucis can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or teas, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
